name: target_finder
description: Start a bounded live target-finding session, consume YOLO26 or local face identity stream tracks when available, and guide the wearer toward person/object tracks with HUD aim assist. Named-contact reminders can use the local OpenVision contact identity DB when enrolled samples exist.

query.description: Original user request. Do not rewrite named-person requests such as 'tìm Trâm' into generic text.

target_name.description: Person/contact name to find, for example 'Trâm' or 'A Bảo'. Include this when the user says a name.

identity_query.description: True when the user wants to identify/find a known person or contact, not just anonymous person tracking.

media_profile.description: Optional Jetson-authoritative live camera profile. Default is rv101_medium_yolo; use diagnostic_30 only for explicit performance tests.

acceptance_tests: updates HUD after YOLO26 external_stream bbox frames arrive
updates HUD after face identity stream bbox and embedding frames arrive
returns anonymous person IDs from perception graph
publishes HUD crosshair and direction hint
returns local contact DB match status for named-contact lookup
falls back to anonymous IDs when no enrolled sample matches
failure_modes: YOLO26 stream bridge ready but no bbox frames published
face identity worker missing OpenCV deps or YuNet/SFace models
named-contact lookup requested before local contact samples exist
